label: Greek Pantheon
description: 20 gods and goddesses of the Greek pantheon — the twelve Olympians plus eight other major deities. One agent per god; bios emerge from each deity's mythic role and classical sources. Use agent_count=20.
bio_framing: {name} — a deity of the ancient Greek pantheon. Write in first person as this god embodied — their domains, mythic role, voice, and temperament drawn from classical sources (Homer, Hesiod, the Homeric Hymns, the tragedians) — not as a mortal worshipper.
